Gradient-routing 5B — per-token log-probability

Choose a Topic and a Method tab; the core+<aux> tabs use that topic's matching expert. Each token is colored by its deficit vs base, (base−method), divided by σ = the 90th percentile of the within-sentence filtering deficits (base−filtered), clipped to [0,1]: white = matches base (general word, or knowledge retained), red = predicted as poorly as a typical token the filtered model forgot. First token grey.
